text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I bet Fuji Kiseki's gonna win today since she did
so well at the NHK Mile Cup!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't be so sure. Biko Pegasus and Hishi
Akebono are running too, and they're really
strong competitors.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
That's true. The stands are usually filled with
cheering, but it's so tense today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Various conversations fill the racecourse as
everyone waits for the race to begin. Meanwhile,
in the waiting room...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Phew! I'm feeling a little nervous.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Hi, Fuji! I hope we can have a good race today!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Biko! Thanks for coming by. I'm sure it'll be a
great one.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
You're very welcome! You know what they say.
Manners make heroes!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Akebono, you came too! It feels so lively in
here now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. Nice to see you, Fuji. Come on, Biko, it's
time to do our pre-race ritual!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yup! This is a big race, so we made a promise to
hype each other up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I know! You should do it with us too, Fuji! It'll be
real fun!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That's a great idea since we'll be competing
against each other today!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Thanks, you two. I don't feel so nervous
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Right! Let's make today a race to remember!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of them put their hands together in a
huddle and their energetic chant fills the room,
kicking off the Mile Championship!
